channel.title: SharonCraft Catalog
channel.description: Bright handmade beadwork for gifts, home styling, and joyful African-inspired looks.

item.g:title: beaded african necklace
item.g:description: This necklaces piece is handmade by SharonCraft with a comfortable feel and a clean finish. It is easy to wear, gift, or keep for days when you want something personal and full of color. Category: Necklaces.

item.g:title: Kenyan Beaded Mats
item.g:description: Kenyan Beaded Mats adds color and handmade character without making the space feel busy. It works well when you want a home piece that feels warm, memorable, and easy to place. Category: Home Decor.

item.g:title: african artistry cup
item.g:description: This home decor piece adds color and handmade character without making the space feel busy. It works well when you want a home piece that feels warm, memorable, and easy to place. Category: Home Decor.

item.g:title: kenya culture beaded sandals
item.g:description: Buy African bags, shoes and accessories Category: Bags & Accessories.

item.g:title: beaded frame wall clock
item.g:description: Add a vibrant and artistic touch to your home with this beaded frame wall clock Category: Home Decor.

item.g:title: bead gift set
item.g:description: A combo you definitely need to add to cart… Category: Gift Sets.

item.g:title: africa artesy creative cup
item.g:description: Add a touch of authentic African artistry to your home Category: Home Decor.

item.g:title: ceaded earing
item.g:description: a grate earing that matches the kenyan tradition Category: Earrings.

item.g:title: africa tribal necklace
item.g:description: africa tribal necklace is a handmade necklace. It works well for birthdays, events, and everyday styling and makes a thoughtful gift or special statement piece. Category: Necklaces.

item.g:title: custom kenya bangle
item.g:description: custom kenya bangle is a handmade bracelet. It works well for daily wear, gifting, and matching sets and makes a thoughtful gift or special statement piece. Category: Bracelets.

item.g:title: rasta colour bead chocker
item.g:description: rasta colour bead chocker is a handmade necklace. It works well for birthdays, events, and everyday styling and makes a thoughtful gift or special statement piece. Category: Necklaces.
